title.ko: 비휴대용 조명장치; 그 시스템; 자동차 외형에 특별히 적합한 자동차 등기구
title.en: NON-PORTABLE LIGHTING DEVICES; SYSTEMS THEREOF; VEHICLE LIGHTING DEVICES SPECIALLY ADAPTED FOR VEHICLE EXTERIORS

definition.ko: 전기적 장치 시스템 F21S2/00 선상 광원(STRING OR STRIP OF LIGHT SOURCES) F21S4/00 자유 스탠드 F21S6/00 고정설비 F21S8/00 내장 전원 F21S9/00 조명효과를 변화시키는 것 F21S10/00 비전기적 장치 일광을 사용하는 것 F21S11/00 광원; 점상 광원 또는 불특정 형태 F21S13/00 기타 장치 F21S15/00 전기적 및 비전기적 장치의 조합 F21S19/00 차량 외부용 차량 조명 장치 F21S41/00, F21S43/00, F21S45/00

title.ko: 메인 그룹 F21S4/00에서 F21S10/00 또는 F21S19/00에 해당하지 않는 조명장치 시스템, 예. 모듈식 구조의 것
title.en: Systems of lighting devices, not provided for in main groups F21S0004000000-F21S0010000000 or F21S0019000000, e.g. of modular construction
Lighting devices or systems using a string or strip of light sources
with light sources attached to loose electric cables, e.g. Christmas tree lights
the cables forming a grid, net or web structure
with light sources held by or within elongate supports
flexible or deformable, e.g. into a curved shape
of ribbon or tape form, e.g. LED tapes
of rope form, e.g. LED lighting ropes, or of tubular form
rigid, e.g. LED bars

title.ko: 자유로이 세워지도록 된 조명 장치(F21S 9/00, F21S 10/00이 우선)
title.en: Lighting devices intended to be free-standing (F21S0009000000, F21S0010000000 take precedence)

title.ko: 고정 설치 되도록 의도한 조명 장치(F21S9/00, F21S 10/00이 우선; 끈형 또는 선형 광원을 사용한 것 F21S 4/00)
title.en: Lighting devices intended for fixed installation (F21S0009000000, F21S0010000000 take precedence;using a string or strip of light sources F21S0004000000)

title.ko: 리세스(recess)-마운트 형, 예. 다운라이터 (downlighter) (자동차의 외형에 특히 적합한것 F21S 41/00-F21S 45/00)
title.en: of recess-mounted type, e.g. downlighters   (specially adapted for vehicle exteriors F21S0041000000-F21S0045000000)

title.ko: 오로지 천장 또는 천장과 같은 윗부분 구조에 설치되는 것만을 의도한 것
title.en: intended only for mounting on a ceiling or like overhead structure (F21S0008020000 takes precedence)
by suspension
with a standard
Lighting devices with a built-in power supply; Systems employing lighting devices with a built-in power supply
the power supply being a battery or accumulator
rechargeable by exposure to light
the power supply being a generator

title.ko: 조명효과를 변화시키는 장치 또는 시스템
title.en: Lighting devices or systems producing a varying lighting effect

title.ko: 색상을 변화시키는 것(10/04가 우선)
title.en: changing colours (F21S0010040000 takes precedence)
simulating flames
flashing, e.g. with rotating reflector or light source
Non-electric lighting devices or systems using daylight
Non-electric lighting devices or systems employing a point-like light source; Non-electric lighting devices or systems employing a light source of unspecified shape
Devices intended to be fixed, e.g. ceiling lamp, wall lamp
with a pendant
multi-branched, e.g. chandelier
with suspension from a stretched wire
with a standard, e.g. street lamp
Devices intended to be free-standing, e.g. table lamp, floor lamp
Lighting systems

title.ko: 메인그룹 F21S 11/00, F21S 13/00 또는 F21S 19/00 또는 13/00에 속하지 않는 광원을 사용하는 비전기적 조명 장치 또는 시스템
title.en: Non-electric lighting devices or systems employing light sources not covered by main groups F21S0011000000, F21S0013000000 or F21S0019000000
Lighting devices or systems employing combinations of electric and non-electric light sources; Replacing or exchanging electric light sources with non-electric light sources or vice versa

title.ko: 자동차의 외형에 특별히 적한 조명장치, 예. 헤드램프 (후진등 F21S 43/00 )
title.en: Vehicle lighting devices specially adapted for vehicle exteriors

title.ko: 자동차의 외형에 특별히 적한 조명장치, 예. 헤드램프 (후진등 F21S 43/00 )
title.en: Illuminating devices specially adapted for vehicle exteriors, e.g. headlamps (reversing lights F21S0043000000)

title.ko: 광원에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: characterised by the light source
characterised by the type of emitted light
Coloured light
Ultraviolet light; Infrared light
polarised
characterised by the type of light source
Light emitting diodes [LED]
the main emission direction of the LED being parallel to the optical axis of the illuminating device
the main emission direction of the LED being opposite to the main emission direction of the illuminating device
the main emission direction of the LED being angled to the optical axis of the illuminating device
the main emission direction of the LED being perpendicular to the optical axis
arranged in one or more lines
arranged in a matrix
Surface emitters, e.g. organic light emitting diodes [OLED]
Laser light sources
Incandescent light sources, e.g. filament or halogen lamps
having two or more filaments
characterised by the shape of the filament
having a filament arranged transversally to the optical axis of the illuminating device
Discharge light sources
High-intensity discharge light sources
Fluorescent light sources
Light sources where the light is generated by photoluminescent material spaced from a primary light generating element

title.ko: 광원 또는 램프 홀더의 부착 (이동식 광원에 의한 가변광 분배 수득 F21S 41/657 )
title.en: Attachment of light sources or lamp holders (achieving variable light distribution by movable light sources F21S0041657000)

title.ko: 굴절기, 투명 커버판, 광가이드 또는 필터에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: characterised by refractors, transparent cover plates, light guides or filters
Light guides
Projection lenses
Lenses with a front view of circular or truncated circular outline
Elongate lenses
Composite lenses; Lenses with a patch-like shape
Thick lenses
Lens surfaces, e.g. coatings or surface structures

title.ko: 그것의 부착 (가변 광 분배를 얻기 위한 것 F21S 41/63 )
title.en: Attachment thereof   (for achieving variable light distribution F21S0041630000)

title.ko: 반사체에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: characterised by reflectors
Optical layout thereof
Multi-surface reflectors, e.g. reflectors with facets or reflectors with portions of different curvature
Combinations of two or more separate reflectors
successively reflecting the light
characterised by their material, surface treatment or coatings

title.ko: 그것의 부착 (이동식 반사체에 의한 가변광 분배 수득 F21S 41/675 )
title.en: Attachment thereof  (achieving variable light distribution by movable reflectors F21S0041675000)

title.ko: 스크린, 비-반사 부재, 차광 부재 또는 고정된 빛가리개를 특징으로하는 것
title.en: characterised by screens, non-reflecting members, light-shielding members or fixed shades
characterised by the shape thereof

title.ko: 그것의 부착 (이동식 스크린에 의한 가변광 분배 수득 F21S 41/683 )
title.en: Attachment thereof   (achieving variable light distribution by movable screens F21S0041683000)
characterised by aesthetic components not otherwise provided for, e.g. decorative trim, partition walls or covers
Attachment thereof

title.ko: 가변 광 분배에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: characterised by a variable light distribution
for adaptation between right-hand and left-hand traffic
by acting on refractors, filters or transparent cover plates
by changing their light transmissivity, e.g. by liquid crystal or electrochromic devices

title.ko: 광원의 작용에 의한 것
title.en: by acting on light sources
by moving light sources

title.ko: 광원의 스위칭에 의한 것(백열광원의 스위칭에 의한 것 F21S 41/162 )
title.en: by switching light sources  (by switching incandescent light sources F21S0041162000)
by acting on reflectors
by moving reflectors

title.ko: 스크린의 작용에 의한 것
title.en: by acting on screens

title.ko: 스크린의 이동에 의한 것
title.en: by moving screens
Blades, i.e. screens moving in a vertical plane
Flaps, i.e. screens pivoting around one of their edges
Shields, i.e. screens not creating an image meant to be projected

title.ko: 수직 축을 중심으로 회전하는 스크린(회전 플랩(flap) F21S 41/689 )
title.en: Screens rotating around a vertical axis  (rotating flaps F21S0041689000)
Shaft-shaped screens rotating along their longitudinal axes
Signalling devices specially adapted for vehicle exteriors, e.g. brake lamps, direction indicator lights or reversing lights
characterised by the light source
characterised by the type of light source
Light emitting diodes [LED]
Surface emitters, e.g. organic light emitting diodes [OLED]
Strips of light sources
Light sources where the light is generated by photoluminescent material spaced from a primary light generating element
Attachment of light sources or lamp holders
characterised by refractors, transparent cover plates, light guides or filters
Light guides
characterised by the shape of the light guide
rod-shaped
plate-shaped
of complex shape
characterised by the emission area
emitting light from one or more of its extremities
emitting light from one or more of its major surfaces
with a single light source being coupled into the light guide
with two or more light sources being coupled into the light guide
the light guides being used to transmit light from remote light sources
Attachment thereof
characterised by reflectors
Optical layout thereof
characterised by their material, surface treatment or coatings
Attachment thereof
characterised by the combination of reflectors and refractors
characterised by aesthetic components not otherwise provided for, e.g. decorative trim, partition walls or covers

title.ko: 광의 방출 또는 분배 이외의 목적으로 차량 외장에 특별히 적합한 차량 조명 장치 내의 장치
title.en: Arrangements within vehicle lighting devices specially adapted for vehicle exteriors, for purposes other than emission or distribution of light

title.ko: 조명 장치의 보호 (조명 장치의 냉각 F21S 45/40, 조명 장치의 방수 F21S 45/50)
title.en: Protection of  lighting devices (cooling of lighting devices F21S0045400000, waterproofing of lighting devices F21S0045500000)

title.ko: 조명 장치에서의 가스 흐름 촉진, 예. 김서림을 제거하기 위해 커버유리를 향하게 흐름을 유도 (환기 F21S 45/30; 강제 냉각 F21S 45/42)
title.en: Promoting gas flow in lighting devices, e.g. directing flow toward the cover glass for demisting  (ventilation F21S0045300000;  forced cooling F21S0045420000)
Ventilation or drainage of lighting devices
specially adapted for headlamps
specially adapted for signal lamps
Cooling of lighting devices
Forced cooling
using gas
circulating the gas within a closed system
using liquid
from other vehicle cooling systems, e.g. from air-conditioning or engine cooling systems
Passive cooling, e.g. using fins, thermal conductive elements or openings
with means for conducting heat from the inside to the outside of the lighting devices, e.g. with fins on the outer surface of the lighting device
Attachment of the cooling means
Waterproofing
Heating of lighting devices, e.g. for demisting
Prevention of harmful light leakage
